# PanPanTech AIESL

> PanPanTech AIESL is a smart retail technology site for electronic shelf labels, AIoT retail sensing hardware, cleaning robots, picking robots, e-paper frames, and retail decision systems.

## Canonical Site

- https://www.aiesl.cn/

## Pages

- Home: https://www.aiesl.cn/
- Products and technology: https://www.aiesl.cn/products.html
- Solutions and cases: https://www.aiesl.cn/solutions.html
- About PanPanTech: https://www.aiesl.cn/about.html
- Contact and demo booking: https://www.aiesl.cn/contact.html

## Crawl Policy

The site is intended to be discoverable by search engines and AI crawlers. See https://www.aiesl.cn/robots.txt and https://www.aiesl.cn/sitemap.xml.
